import React from 'react'; const projects = [ { id: 1, featured: true, className: 'p1', label: 'Full Stack + ML', year: '2024', name: 'SmartTask — AI-Powered Task Manager', desc: 'An intelligent task management application with ML-based priority prediction, smart scheduling, and responsive design. Built for productivity optimization.', tech: ['React', 'Node.js', 'Python', 'TensorFlow', 'MongoDB'], links: [{ label: 'Live Demo', icon: 'external' }, { label: 'Source', icon: 'github' }] }, { id: 2, featured: false, className: 'p2', label: 'Frontend', year: '2024', name: 'EcoShop — Sustainable E-commerce', desc: 'Responsive e-commerce platform promoting sustainable products with advanced filtering and smooth user experience.', tech: ['React', 'Tailwind CSS', 'Redux', 'Firebase'], links: [{ label: 'Live Demo', icon: 'external' }, { label: 'Source', icon: 'github' }] }, // Add more projects... ]; const Projects = ({ toggleHover }) => { return (
Work

Selected
Projects

All on GitHub
{projects.map((project) => (
{project.label}
{project.year}
{project.name}

{project.desc}

{project.tech.map((t) => ({t}))}
{project.links.map((link, idx) => ( {link.label} ))}
))}
); }; export default Projects;
